title: Financial Products for Hedging: Masters in Business with Jeff Chang
description: Barry speaks with Jeff Chang, President and Co-Founder of Vest. They discuss his journey into founding Vest. They also discuss Jeff's views on the benefits of hedging along with with the growth in popularity of ETFs. They also talk about the creation of financial products geared towards hedging.  (Source: Bloomberg)
